zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Mary Aitkins於1553年9月12日出生在英國奧可福爾卡維沙安時，她的父親Thomas Atkins28歲，母親Lady Margarett Cooke28歲。她於1571年1月29日與Martyn Johnson在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾素特頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1634年10月21日在英國格盧斯特斯爾普雷斯頓 奧 斯圖享年81歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Mary Aitkins于1553年9月12日出生在英国奧可福爾卡維沙安时，她的父亲Thomas Atkins28岁，母亲Lady Margarett Cooke28岁。她于1571年1月29日与Martyn Johnson在英国英格兰林可爾史爾素特頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1634年10月21日在英国格盧斯特斯爾普雷斯頓 奧 斯圖享年81岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Aitkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Atkins
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Atkin (a pet form of Adam) with genitival -s, or a variant of Atkin , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Mary Aitkins was born on 12 September 1553, in Caversham, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Atkins, was 28 and her mother, Lady Margarett Cooke, was 28. She married Martyn Johnson on 29 January 1571, in Sutterton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 21 October 1634, in Preston on Stour, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Mary Aitkins est née le 12 septembre 1553, à Caversham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Atkins, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Margarett Cooke, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Martyn Johnson le 29 janvier 1571, à Sutterton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 octobre 1634, à Preston on Stour, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

Lei sposato Martyn Johnson il 29 gennaio 1571, nel Sutterton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Mary Aitkinsが1553年9月12日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカバーシャムで生まれた時，父Thomas Atkinsは28歳，母Lady Margarett Cookeは28歳であった。1571年1月29日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスッテルトンでMartyn Johnsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1634年10月21日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアプレストン オン ストウルで81歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング ソドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Mary Aitkins(이)가 1553년 9월 12일 영국 스퍼드실르 카버샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Atkins(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margarett Cooke(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1571년 1월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 수터턴에서 Martyn Johnson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1634년 10월 21일 영국 그루스스터실르 프레스턴  스토우르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 치핀그 소드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Mary Aitkins nasceu em 12 de setembro de 1553, em Caversham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Atkins, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margarett Cooke, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Martyn Johnson em 29 de janeiro de 1571, em Sutterton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1634, em Preston on Stour, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Mary Aitkins родилась 12 сентября 1553 г. в местности кавиршам, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Atkins было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margarett Cooke, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Martyn Johnson 29 января 1571 г. в местности суттиртон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 21 октября 1634 г. в местности престон он стоур, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности чиппинг содбури, глоусестиршир, Англия.
